creator: rainbow@sanitylinux.org
text:
^ I figured out the right way to do it, without relying on sed.
Thank you porter's handbook <3

I debated writing out a post-install message for saying "hey puppetmaster is being deprecated, go install sysutils/puppetserver", but I'm afraid I don't have much of a way with words, and I feel like someone more experienced at writing those messages should take the whack at it.
